title: A Meditation On Rhode-Island Coal.
content:
Decolor, obscuris, vilis, non ille repexam
    Cesariem regum, non candida virginis ornat
    Colla, nec insigni splendet per cingula morsu.
    Sed nova si nigri videas miracula saxi,
    Tunc superat pulchros cultus et quicquid Eois
    Indus litoribus rubr� scrutatur in alg�.
meaning:
"A Meditation On Rhode-Island Coal." is a quintessential example of William Cullen Bryant's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
